src: A waterfall cascading down a rugged cliff, surrounded by greenery and moss-covered rocks. Water splashes into a pool below, with mist and sunlight. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by trees and vibrant foliage.
edit: A waterfall cascades down a rugged cliff at sunset, surrounded by greenery and moss-covered rocks. Water gleams with reflections, splashing into a pool. Towering trees touched by sunset create a serene backdrop. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by foliage.

per_image_non_shared_src.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: The waterfall is centered with sunlight streaming through tree branches, tall trees with dark leaves surround. A stone bridge is in the middle, with dense green foliage and mossy rocks at the sides.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: A waterfall is centered with golden autumn leaves surrounding it. A stone bridge stands in the middle of the cascading water. The foreground has green shrubbery and brown tree trunks.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: The waterfall cascades down steep rocks, surrounded by lush greenery and steep cliffs, with a stone bridge arching over the lower cascade and abundant moss and foliage covering the rocks.
per_image_non_shared_src.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: Waterfall in the center with mist, surrounded by barren trees, a stone bridge in the middle, with grey rocks and sparse foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: Waterfall flows down a cliff face, framed by dense green trees and bright sunlight. A stone bridge spans the middle, vibrant foliage covers the cliffs.

per_image_non_shared_edit.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: The waterfall is centered with a golden sunset glow. Tall trees with dark orange and maroon leaves surround it. A stone bridge in the water's path reflects the fading sunlight. Dense foliage and mossy rocks are softly lit, creating a tranquil scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: A mesmerizing waterfall is centered at sunset, surrounded by glowing autumn leaves. A stone bridge stands against the water, illuminated by the setting sun. In the foreground, green shrubbery and brown tree trunks have a reddish tint.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: A waterfall cascades down steep, mossy rocks, illuminated by a sunset's orange glow. A stone bridge arches over the lower cascade. Lush greenery on either side and cliffs are touched by warm dusk colors, in a serene scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: A glimmering waterfall in the center with mist rising, surrounded by silhouetted barren trees in orange and pink tones. A stone bridge, glowing in sunset. Grey rocks with reddish tints, sparse foliage in amber and maroon, dominated by the sunset's vibrant ambiance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: A waterfall flows down a cliff face illuminated by sunset hues. Dense trees form silhouettes against the sky. A stone bridge reflects soft orange and pink tones. Cliffs are covered with foliage, tinted with a sunset glow.
